jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
